power.method: Rechargeable battery (up to 10 months per charge) or wired to existing doorbell transformer wiring; Qualcomm QCC730 Micro-Power WiFi chip

features: Qualcomm QCC730 Micro-Power WiFi — up to 96% better battery life than industry standard
no subscription required for local storage
release_notes: Announced at CES 2026 (Jan 2026) as part of Reolink's Qualcomm QCC730 Power-Efficient Series; launched June 15, 2026 at $129.99. As of this 2026-07-04 audit, Reolink had not yet published a dedicated reolink.com/product/ spec page indexed/reachable (distinct from the older, still-listed 'Reolink Video Doorbell (Battery)' at reolink.com/product/reolink-doorbell-battery/, which is a separate 1st-gen product per support.reolink.com's Chime Plus/NVR compatibility articles that list them as distinct SKUs). Fields not explicitly stated in the official press release or support articles (field_of_view_deg, night_vision, ip_rating, storage.cloud) were removed rather than carried over/guessed — re-verify once Reolink publishes the dedicated product/spec page.
